package_versions_manifest_v0.name: package_versions_manifest_v0
package_versions_manifest_v0.value: "manifest" IS NULL OR ("manifest" ->> 'schema_version') IS NULL OR ("manifest" ->> 'schema_version') LIKE '0.%'

packages_draft_manifest_v0.name: packages_draft_manifest_v0
packages_draft_manifest_v0.value: "draft_manifest" IS NULL OR ("draft_manifest" ->> 'schema_version') IS NULL OR ("draft_manifest" ->> 'schema_version') LIKE '0.%'

credential_proxy_usage_principal_single.name: credential_proxy_usage_principal_single
credential_proxy_usage_principal_single.value: api_key_id IS NULL OR user_id IS NULL

uq_llm_usage_proxy_request_id.name: uq_llm_usage_proxy_request_id
uq_llm_usage_proxy_request_id.where: source = 'proxy' AND request_id IS NOT NULL

uq_llm_usage_runner_run_id.name: uq_llm_usage_runner_run_id
uq_llm_usage_runner_run_id.where: source = 'runner' AND run_id IS NOT NULL

llm_usage_principal_single.name: llm_usage_principal_single
llm_usage_principal_single.value: api_key_id IS NULL OR user_id IS NULL

llm_usage_proxy_has_request_id.name: llm_usage_proxy_has_request_id
llm_usage_proxy_has_request_id.value: source <> 'proxy' OR request_id IS NOT NULL

llm_usage_runner_has_run_id.name: llm_usage_runner_has_run_id
llm_usage_runner_has_run_id.value: source <> 'runner' OR run_id IS NOT NULL

pkp_actor_id_shape.name: pkp_actor_id_shape
pkp_actor_id_shape.value: (actor_type = 'shared' AND actor_id IS NULL) OR (actor_type <> 'shared' AND actor_id IS NOT NULL)

idx_runs_sink_expires_at.name: idx_runs_sink_expires_at
idx_runs_sink_expires_at.where: "runs"."sink_expires_at" IS NOT NULL AND "runs"."sink_closed_at" IS NULL

idx_runs_stall_sweep.name: idx_runs_stall_sweep
idx_runs_stall_sweep.where: "runs"."sink_closed_at" IS NULL AND "runs"."sink_expires_at" IS NOT NULL

runs_at_most_one_actor.name: runs_at_most_one_actor
runs_at_most_one_actor.value: NOT (user_id IS NOT NULL AND end_user_id IS NOT NULL)

runs_open_sink_has_secret.name: runs_open_sink_has_secret
runs_open_sink_has_secret.value: sink_expires_at IS NULL OR sink_secret_encrypted IS NOT NULL

package_schedules_exactly_one_actor.name: package_schedules_exactly_one_actor
package_schedules_exactly_one_actor.value: (user_id IS NOT NULL) <> (end_user_id IS NOT NULL)

integration_conn_exactly_one_owner.name: integration_conn_exactly_one_owner
integration_conn_exactly_one_owner.value: (user_id IS NOT NULL AND end_user_id IS NULL) OR (user_id IS NULL AND end_user_id IS NOT NULL)

webhooks_level_check.name: webhooks_level_check
webhooks_level_check.value: (level = 'org' AND application_id IS NULL) OR (level = 'application' AND application_id IS NOT NULL)

oauth_clients_level_check.name: oauth_clients_level_check
oauth_clients_level_check.value: (level = 'org' AND referenced_org_id IS NOT NULL AND referenced_application_id IS NULL) OR (level = 'application' AND referenced_application_id IS NOT NULL AND referenced_org_id IS NULL) OR (level = 'instance' AND referenced_org_id IS NULL AND referenced_application_id IS NULL)
